props.name: blobType
props.description: 'circle'

props.name: fillColor
props.description: Background color of each blob.

props.name: trailCount
props.description: How many trailing blobs.

props.name: sizes
props.description: Sizes (px) of each blob. Length must be ≥ trailCount.

props.name: innerSizes
props.description: Sizes (px) of inner dots. Length must be ≥ trailCount.

props.name: innerColor
props.description: Background color of the inner dot.

props.name: opacities
props.description: Opacity of each blob. Length ≥ trailCount.

props.name: shadowColor
props.description: Box-shadow color.

props.name: shadowBlur
props.description: Box-shadow blur radius (px).

props.name: shadowOffsetX
props.description: Box-shadow X offset (px).

props.name: shadowOffsetY
props.description: Box-shadow Y offset (px).

props.name: filterId
props.description: Optional custom filter ID (for multiple instances).

props.name: filterStdDeviation
props.description: feGaussianBlur stdDeviation for SVG filter.

props.name: filterColorMatrixValues
props.description: feColorMatrix values for SVG filter.

props.name: useFilter
props.description: Enable the SVG filter.

props.name: fastDuration
props.description: GSAP duration for the lead blob.

props.name: slowDuration
props.description: GSAP duration for the following blobs.

props.name: fastEase
props.description: GSAP ease for the lead blob.

props.name: slowEase
props.description: GSAP ease for the following blobs.

props.name: zIndex
props.description: CSS z-index of the whole component.
